metadata.title: COLHYBRI. Own Your Neighborhood. Own Your Future.
metadata.description: The platform revitalizing downtowns through neighborhood community support. From Paris to Pittsburgh.

hero.headline: Own Your Neighborhood. Own Your Future.
hero.subheadline: The platform revitalizing downtowns through neighborhood community support. From Paris to Pittsburgh.

problem.headline: The problem is measurable
problem.subheadline: Downtown commercial vitality is collapsing. The programs exist. The tools are missing.

vacancy.label: of midsize downtowns facing commercial vacancy

invisible.label: of small businesses invisible on Google

solution.headline: How COLHYBRI revitalizes your downtown
solution.subheadline: Three pillars, one goal: bring your main street back to life.

pillar1.title: Neighborhood community support
pillar1.description: Three dollars a month. 75% goes to the pool. Services gifted at random to a neighbor, a shop, a local cause.

pillar2.title: Digital visibility
pillar2.description: Automated Google audit. Zero-friction onboarding for merchants. Continuous monitoring of online presence.

pillar3.title: Community engagement
pillar3.description: 26 hyperlocal mini-games. Neighborhood challenges. Rankings by main street. The street becomes a collective playground.

institutional.headline: Inside the global revitalization ecosystem
institutional.subheadline: COLHYBRI fits into the downtown revitalization programs of France, the United States and Europe.

worldImpact.headline: Our impact, from local to global
worldImpact.subheadline: One tool, adapted to every territory. From a French ZRCV town to an American Main Street.

france.title: France
france.detail: 1,732 ZRCV towns. 244 Action Coeur de Ville. 1,646 Petites Villes de Demain.

usa.title: United States
usa.detail: 8,764 Opportunity Zones. 6,544 OZ 2.0 in 2026. 1,200 Main Street communities.

europe.title: Europe
europe.detail: Barcelona, European Capital of Small Commerce 2026. EUI Call 4: 60M EUR ERDF.

latam.title: Latin America
latam.detail: 55% informal employment. 2.1% growth in 2026. Formalization through digitalization.

africa.title: Africa
africa.detail: 4.3% growth in 2026. Rapid urbanization. No digital tool dedicated to urban commerce.

triplePlay.headline: The ONLYMORE triple-play
triplePlay.subheadline: Three pillars, one ecosystem. Downtown revitalization through commerce, sport and credit.
triplePlay.quote: A sports club that fills the downtown. Merchants who keep the neighborhood alive. A credit line that finances growth.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.headline: Doing our part, like the hummingbird
mission.description: In a Native American legend, while the forest burns, the hummingbird carries water drop by drop. Asked why, it replies: I am doing my part. COLHYBRI embodies this spirit. Small actions by many create massive collective impact on downtown vitality.

inclusion.title: Neighborhood community support
inclusion.description: COLHYBRI is a digital neighborhood mutual. Three dollars a month funds a community pool redistributed as services offered by main street merchants.

commerce.title: Local commerce
commerce.description: Local shops become the first beneficiaries of their own neighborhood. Digital visibility, loyalty, traffic restored. The downtown comes back to life.

community.title: Collective engagement
community.description: When individuals and merchants connect through COLHYBRI, money circulates locally. Engagement brings meaning back to the main street and its residents.

howItWorks.title: Solution
howItWorks.headline: Three simple steps to revitalize your neighborhood

subscribe.title: Subscribe
subscribe.description: Three dollars a month, no commitment. 75% of your contribution goes to your neighborhood community pool.

connect.title: Connect locally
connect.description: Discover local shops through Maps+. Automated Google audit and zero-friction onboarding for every merchant.

thrive.title: Thrive together
thrive.description: Every dollar circulates locally. Services are redistributed at random to a neighbor, a merchant or a local cause in the neighborhood.

impact.title: Impact
impact.headline: The Keynesian multiplier in action
impact.description: Every dollar that circulates locally multiplies its value in economic activity. COLHYBRI channels spending into local commerce, revitalizes downtowns and builds more resilient neighborhoods.

jobsCreated.label: Per 200 active subscribers in a neighborhood

miami.title: Miami
miami.headline: Miami, a pilot city for US downtown revitalization
miami.description: Miami-Dade combines thriving local commerce with a large bilingual population and a main-street revitalization agenda. It is a relevant pilot for rolling COLHYBRI out across American downtowns.

whyMiami.title: Why Miami?
reasons: A dense local commerce ecosystem along Main Streets
A large bilingual community aligned with our multilingual product
A gateway to Latin America for regional expansion
Local institutions engaged in downtown revitalization

forIndividuals.title: For Individuals
forIndividuals.headline: Own your neighborhood, one gesture at a time
forIndividuals.description: Three dollars a month funds a community pool that reshapes your downtown. Discover local shops, gift services at random, play hyperlocal mini-games. Your gesture counts. So does theirs.

forShops.title: For Local Shops
forShops.headline: Your shop, at the heart of the neighborhood
forShops.description: Join COLHYBRI and reclaim your digital visibility. Automated Google audit, zero-friction onboarding, vitality dashboard. Bring foot traffic back to your main street.

forCities.title: For Cities
forCities.headline: The downtown vitality dashboard your city needs
forCities.description: COLHYBRI gives city halls the commercial vitality dashboard their main street deserves. Automated Google audit for every shop in 48 hours. Monthly dashboard. Municipal impact report.

benefits.multiplier: Measurable increase in local economic activity through the Keynesian multiplier effect
benefits.inclusion: Support downtown revitalization programs (ZRCV, ACV, PVD, Main Street, OZ 2.0)
benefits.fabric: Strengthen the commercial fabric of neighborhoods and support local businesses
benefits.dashboard: Real-time vitality dashboard tracking jobs, spending, and community growth

ecosystem.title: Ecosystem
ecosystem.headline: The COLHYBRI ecosystem
ecosystem.description: COLHYBRI is a technology platform dedicated to downtown revitalization through neighborhood community support. Our ecosystem connects individuals, local shops and cities.

individuals.title: Individuals
individuals.description: Support your neighborhood through a mutualized community pool.

shops.title: Local Shops
shops.description: Reclaim your digital visibility and bring foot traffic back to your shop.

cities.title: Cities and institutions
cities.description: Equip your main street with a commercial vitality dashboard.

investors.title: Investors
investors.headline: Invest in downtown revitalization
investors.description: COLHYBRI combines a mutual-driven business model with massive impact on main street vitality. We are raising a pre-seed round with partners who share our vision.

questions.a: COLHYBRI is a digital neighborhood mutual that revitalizes downtowns through community support. Individuals subscribe for three dollars a month, 75% of the contribution goes to a community pool redistributed as services offered by main street merchants.
Three dollars a month for individuals. Ten dollars a month for merchants. Zero commission. Sign up on colhybri.com.
Maps+ is our automated Google audit tool. It scores every shop's online presence, generates improvement recommendations and onboards merchants with zero friction.

questions.q: How does the community pool work?
questions.a: 75% of every monthly subscription is pooled at the neighborhood level. Services are then gifted at random to a neighbor, a shop or a local cause. It is not charity. It is a digital mutual.

questions.q: Is COLHYBRI available in my country?
questions.a: COLHYBRI is active in France and expanding across Europe, the United States and Latin America. See our Impact pages for regional rollout plans.
Cities can start a 90-day free pilot on 50 shops in their downtown. Reach out from the For Cities page.
COLHYBRI is created and led by founder and CEO Florent Gibert, within the ONLYMORE Group ecosystem.
Our pre-seed round details are available on the Investors page. Reach out to book a call.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.description: Interested in COLHYBRI? Whether you're an individual, a local shop owner, a city official, or an investor, we'd love to hear from you.

footer.tagline: Own Your Neighborhood. Own Your Future.
footer.quote: I am doing my part. Native American legend of the hummingbird.

localStats.title: Local Impact in Your Country
localStats.subtitle: Real economic data showing how COLHYBRI can transform your community.

thirdPlace.label: Trust and Loneliness Barometer
thirdPlace.headline: 1.4 billion adults are lonely. COLHYBRI is the digital third place.
thirdPlace.subheadline: Social trust is collapsing worldwide. Isolation and declining downtown vitality feed each other. COLHYBRI rebuilds community through neighborhood engagement.

city.metaTitle: COLHYBRI in {city}. Revitalize your downtown with neighborhood community support.
city.metaDescription: COLHYBRI helps revitalize {city}, {region} through neighborhood community support and digital visibility for local shops.
city.heroDescription: {city} and its {population} inhabitants deserve accessible financial services. COLHYBRI connects underbanked residents with local shops to build a community-powered economy.
city.benefit1Description: Give underbanked residents in {city} access to essential financial services through neighborhood shops.
city.benefit2Description: Every dollar spent locally in {city} multiplies its economic impact through the community.
city.benefit3Description: Local shops in {city} become digital third places, where community support meets main street revitalization.
city.benefit4Description: Track real-time economic impact: jobs created, money circulating locally in {city}.
city.ctaDescription: Join COLHYBRI and help build financial inclusion in your neighborhood.
